title: calamintha officinalis var. stricta
intro: Calamintha officinalis var. stricta, also known as pineapple mint or mountain mint, is a variety of the Calamintha officinalis plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) characterized by its distinctive square stems and small, fragrant leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Calamintha officinalis var. stricta include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems such as colds and coughs. Calamintha officinalis var. stricta can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile addition to natural health remedies.
